projectDescription: A suite of Windows applications for Steam Deck that provides fan control, performance overlay, power/TDP management, and Steam controller emulation.
keyFeatures: Fan Control with SteamOS-based curve reimplementation and EC manipulation
Performance Overlay with FPS, CPU, GPU, battery, and APU power metrics
Power Control for TDP, refresh rate, resolution, FPS limit, brightness, and volume
Steam Controller emulation supporting Desktop, X360, DS4, and Steam modes
Battery charge limit control (70%/80%/90%/100%) for OLED and LCD models
SMT (Simultaneous Multi-Threading) toggle per-game via AMD APU
Anti-cheat awareness with kernel-feature opt-in acknowledgement
Auto-update and Sentry error tracking with privacy controls
publicApiSurface: DisableCheckForUpdates.txt — Opt-out file for telemetry and auto-updates
